# Amazon generated output

This folder was generated from the `Amazon` ENORM model version `3.0`.

## Generated files
- `src/generated/amazon/AmazonApplication.java`
- `src/generated/amazon/model/Users.java`
- `src/generated/amazon/model/Resources.java`
- `src/generated/amazon/model/Contexts.java`
- `src/generated/amazon/model/Relations.java`
- `src/generated/amazon/model/Feedback.java`
- `src/generated/amazon/governance/AmazonGovernance.java`
- `src/generated/amazon/runtime/RuleBodies.java`

## Runtime profile
`catalog-commerce`

## Notes
This single Acceleo module supports Amazon, Reddit, and YouTube by reading the same ENORM metamodel and the corresponding instance models.
